test-case.name: OnValidate_ControllerCategoryWithKeyboardOnlyBindings_EmitsWarning
test-case.output: InputBindingProfileSO '': InputSourceCategory が Controller に設定されていますが、ActionMap 'Expression' のバインディングはすべて Keyboard デバイスを参照しています。意図した設定か確認してください（Keyboard 用アダプタへ振り分けるには InputSourceCategory を Keyboard に変更してください）。

test-case.name: StackDepthExceeded_DifferentInstances_EachEmitWarningOnce
test-case.output: [ExpressionTriggerInputSource] id='controller-expr': Expression stack depth exceeded (maxStackDepth=1). Dropping oldest expression. This warning is emitted only once per instance. [ExpressionTriggerInputSource] id='keyboard-expr': Expression stack depth exceeded (maxStackDepth=1). Dropping oldest expression. This warning is emitted only once per instance.

test-case.name: StackDepthExceeded_DropsOldestAndCallsHook
test-case.output: [ExpressionTriggerInputSource] id='controller-expr': Expression stack depth exceeded (maxStackDepth=2). Dropping oldest expression. This warning is emitted only once per instance.

test-case.name: StackDepthExceeded_EmitsWarningOncePerInstance
test-case.output: [ExpressionTriggerInputSource] id='controller-expr': Expression stack depth exceeded (maxStackDepth=2). Dropping oldest expression. This warning is emitted only once per instance.

test-case.name: StackDepthExceeded_SecondOverflow_DoesNotEmitAdditionalWarning
test-case.output: [ExpressionTriggerInputSource] id='controller-expr': Expression stack depth exceeded (maxStackDepth=2). Dropping oldest expression. This warning is emitted only once per instance.

test-case.name: Aggregate_AllSourcesInvalid_WarnsOnceAndOutputsZero
test-case.output: [LayerInputSourceAggregator] layer 0: no valid input source (all sources reported IsValid=false or no source registered). Output will be zero. This warning is emitted only once per layer per session.

test-case.name: Aggregate_EmptyLayerCoexistsWithValidLayer_OnlyEmptyLayerWarns
test-case.output: [LayerInputSourceAggregator] layer 1: no valid input source (all sources reported IsValid=false or no source registered). Output will be zero. This warning is emitted only once per layer per session.

test-case.name: Aggregate_LayerRecoversAfterBeingEmpty_DoesNotWarnAgain
test-case.output: [LayerInputSourceAggregator] layer 0: no valid input source (all sources reported IsValid=false or no source registered). Output will be zero. This warning is emitted only once per layer per session.

test-case.name: Aggregate_NoSourcesRegisteredForLayer_WarnsOnceAndOutputsZero
test-case.output: [LayerInputSourceAggregator] layer 0: no valid input source (all sources reported IsValid=false or no source registered). Output will be zero. This warning is emitted only once per layer per session.

test-case.name: Aggregate_VerboseLogging_RateLimitsIndependentlyPerLayer
test-case.output: [LayerInputSourceAggregator] layer 0: weights=[osc=0.25] [LayerInputSourceAggregator] layer 1: weights=[lipsync=0.75]

test-case.name: Aggregate_VerboseLogging_RateLimitsTo_OncePerSecondPerLayer
test-case.output: [LayerInputSourceAggregator] layer 0: weights=[osc=0.5] [LayerInputSourceAggregator] layer 0: weights=[osc=0.5]

test-case.name: Aggregate_VerboseLogging_WhenDisabled_DoesNotLog
test-case.output: [LayerInputSourceAggregator] layer 0: weights=[osc=1]

test-case.name: TryAddSource_DuplicateId_LogsWarningAndReturnsFalse
test-case.output: LayerInputSourceRegistry: TryAddSource の id='osc' は layerIdx=0 に既に登録されているためスキップします。

test-case.name: TryAddSource_NullSource_LogsWarningAndReturnsFalse
test-case.output: LayerInputSourceRegistry: TryAddSource の source が null のためスキップします (layerIdx=0)。

test-case.name: TryAddSource_OutOfRangeLayer_LogsWarningAndReturnsFalse
test-case.output: LayerInputSourceRegistry: TryAddSource の layerIdx=5 が範囲外のためスキップします (LayerCount=1)。

test-case.name: TryRemoveSource_NonExistentId_LogsWarningAndReturnsFalse
test-case.output: LayerInputSourceRegistry: TryRemoveSource の id='x-missing' は layerIdx=0 に見つかりません。

test-case.name: TryRemoveSource_OutOfRangeLayer_LogsWarningAndReturnsFalse
test-case.output: LayerInputSourceRegistry: TryRemoveSource の layerIdx=9 が範囲外のためスキップします (LayerCount=1)。

test-case.name: BulkScope_OutOfRangeIndex_WarnsAndDoesNotModifyExistingWeights
test-case.output: LayerInputSourceWeightBuffer: BulkScope.SetWeight の (layerIdx=5, sourceIdx=0) が範囲外のため書込をスキップします (LayerCount=1, MaxSourcesPerLayer=1)。 LayerInputSourceWeightBuffer: BulkScope.SetWeight の (layerIdx=0, sourceIdx=9) が範囲外のため書込をスキップします (LayerCount=1, MaxSourcesPerLayer=1)。 LayerInputSourceWeightBuffer: BulkScope.SetWeight の (layerIdx=-1, sourceIdx=-1) が範囲外のため書込をスキップします (LayerCount=1, MaxSourcesPerLayer=1)。

test-case.name: SetWeight_LayerIdxBeyondLayerCount_LogsWarningAndLeavesWeightsUnchanged
test-case.output: LayerInputSourceWeightBuffer: SetWeight の (layerIdx=2, sourceIdx=0) が範囲外のため書込をスキップします (LayerCount=2, MaxSourcesPerLayer=3)。

test-case.name: SetWeight_NegativeIndices_LogsWarningAndLeavesWeightsUnchanged
test-case.output: LayerInputSourceWeightBuffer: SetWeight の (layerIdx=-1, sourceIdx=0) が範囲外のため書込をスキップします (LayerCount=1, MaxSourcesPerLayer=1)。

test-case.name: SetWeight_OutOfRange_DoesNotAdvanceDirtyTick
test-case.output: LayerInputSourceWeightBuffer: SetWeight の (layerIdx=9, sourceIdx=0) が範囲外のため書込をスキップします (LayerCount=1, MaxSourcesPerLayer=1)。

test-case.name: SetWeight_SourceIdxBeyondMaxSourcesPerLayer_LogsWarningAndLeavesWeightsUnchanged
test-case.output: LayerInputSourceWeightBuffer: SetWeight の (layerIdx=0, sourceIdx=5) が範囲外のため書込をスキップします (LayerCount=2, MaxSourcesPerLayer=2)。

test-case.name: RebuildWithPaths_SinglePath_RoundTrip_PathMatch
test-case.output: Saving results to: C:/Users/Hidano/AppData/LocalLow/DefaultCompany/FacialControl\TestResults.xml
